title: super super Random mod
description: This mod includes many random items such as a new ore and a metal detector!
body:
# Super super random mod

###  **⚠️⚠️⚠️ WARNING! THIS MOD WILL SHOW THE NAME "example mod" IN GAME ⚠️⚠️⚠️**


There is a metal detector to find ores, a sapphire ore, block, and there is a strawberry that gives you speed! There is also a end sapphire ore, a nether sapphire ore, a deepslate ore, and new recipies. These recipies include 9 sapphire to a sapphire block, 9 raw sapphire to a raw sapphire block, and you can do all of these the other way around by putting the sapphire block or raw sapphire block back in the crafting table. You can also smelt the raw sapphire into a sapphire.

[How to make this mod and how I made it and where it first came from](https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLKGarocXCE1H9Y21-pxjt5Pt8bW14twa-&si=VxGseyGg9EJj3qnT)
